name: Common dev setup (tmux/neovim + dotfiles & skills clone)
description: Installs a shared CLI toolchain at build time and clones your dotfiles / llm-skills repos at container creation (using VS Code's forwarded git credentials).

dotfilesRepo.description: HTTPS URL of your dotfiles repo. Cloned (sparse) by postCreateCommand. Set to "" to skip.

llmSkillsRepo.description: HTTPS URL of your llm-skills repo. Cloned by postCreateCommand. Set to "" to skip.
